Then he also worked in the Emergency Room admissions, checking in patients and handling insurance verification. So, both of his job experiences are in a medical setting—specifically in admissions and patient check-in roles. These are typically roles found in hospitals. The Cardiovascular Rehabilitation Unit and the Emergency Room are departments within a hospital. His responsibilities involve patient interaction, administrative tasks like data entry, and communication between patients/families and medical staff.
